items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: The light sparks all began swaying up and down as if trying to say "thank you."

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Well, what do we have here? It's that Nimbus Wraith we met before. Looks like you made some new friends.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: So it's saying it's a combination of frequencies and there are many more just like it. This "blob of light" we're seeing now is what their complete form is supposed to look like.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Those statues were meant to absorb any Remnant Energy spill from the Inverted Tower to prevent another Dark Tide.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Sounds like they accidentally got sealed inside while goofing around. Later the shockwaves from your brawl with the Maiden must've loosened up the seal a bit.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: It managed to squeeze some energy through the cracks which turned into a Nimbus Wraith looking for help.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: After getting rescued by you, it immediately began searching for its friends at night, when they’re at max power and easier to find.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: They really wanted to say thank you, but they were kinda in a bit of a hurry... That's why skedaddled every time after leading us to a chest.

options.text: Aww. That's so sweet of you.
All you had to do was ask.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: It says that their sister taught them to learn to figure things out by themselves before causing trouble for others.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Most of them have made it out by now. But they appreciate your kindness either way!

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: And... as a thank you, next time we visit the tower, they'll have a surprise ready for us.

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: Now that's something I really look forward to.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Sweet! You can bet we'll be back for that surprise!
